macro.intro: The macroeconomic landscape remains tense with PCE Inflation at 129.45 and a Fed Funds Rate steady at 3.64%. The 10Y-2Y Yield Spread has narrowed to 0.5%, indicating potential economic uncertainty. No major economic events are scheduled today, allowing markets to digest recent geopolitical developments.

snapshot.name: WTI Crude Oil
snapshot.note: Supply concerns due to Iran conflict

snapshot.name: VIX
snapshot.note: Risk-off sentiment due to geopolitical risks

setups.name: WTI Crude Oil Long Setup
setups.rationale: WTI Crude Oil is trading at $85.30, driven by supply concerns amid the Iran conflict. With the EU warning of prolonged energy shocks, oil prices are likely to remain elevated. The absence of major economic events today allows focus on geopolitical developments.

concerns.label: Primary risk
concerns.text: Rapid de-escalation in Iran could lower prices below $82.00

setups.hedge: Consider shorting S&P 500 if oil prices fall below $82.00.

setups.name: S&P 500 Long Setup
setups.rationale: The S&P 500 is trading at 4520.00, buoyed by tech rallies. Despite geopolitical tensions, the index is approaching record highs. The absence of economic events today allows for a focus on corporate earnings.

concerns.label: Primary risk
concerns.text: Geopolitical escalation could trigger a sell-off below 4450.00

setups.hedge: Consider long VIX if S&P 500 breaks below 4450.00.

setups.name: EUR/USD Short Setup
setups.rationale: EUR/USD is trading at 1.0950, facing resistance at 1.1000. With the Fed Funds Rate steady at 3.64% and geopolitical tensions, the USD may strengthen, pressuring the EUR.

metrics.label: Economic event
metrics.text: No events today, focus on geopolitical impact

metrics.text: Not available, but USD strength likely

setups.hedge: Consider long Gold if EUR/USD breaks above 1.1000.

contrarian.body: Gold is trading at 1980.50, with safe-haven demand high due to geopolitical tensions. However, if tensions ease, gold could face selling pressure. The narrowing 10Y-2Y Yield Spread suggests potential USD strength, which could weigh on gold.
contrarian.warning: A sudden escalation in geopolitical tensions could drive gold prices above 2000.00. Monitor geopolitical news closely.

avoid.reason: Tech stocks are rallying, but overbought conditions pose a risk.
